images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑look model, early twenty‑something, standing on a sun‑dappled forest pathway, wearing a form‑fitting ivory ribbed high‑neck sweater that clings to her hourglass silhouette, paired with a sleek white tennis skirt that brushes her thighs and a pair of pristine white sneakers.
